summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cafe POS bill generator software. Backend APIs mostly functional with 1 critical issue. Frontend UI and integration working excellently.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks menu item creation functionality in Menu Management
critical_bugs.error_details: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]
critical_bugs.root_cause: FastAPI trying to serialize MongoDB ObjectId in response. Need to use serialize_doc function or remove _id field before returning.

working_endpoints: /api/bills (POST) - Creates bills with bill numbers successfully

passed_tests: Frontend loads correctly with 19 menu items displayed
Menu item selection adds to bill panel
Charge button creates bill and shows success toast (Bill CAFE-1002 created)
Navigation between Terminal, History, Menu views works
Bill detail view displays receipt correctly
Menu Management shows 19 items with Add Item button
Add item form modal opens and closes properly
Pre-seeded data: 18 menu items across 5 categories (Coffee, Pastry, Tea, Food, Drinks)
Bill creation with bill numbering (CAFE-xxxx format)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in POST /api/menu-items endpoint. The create_menu_item function needs to use serialize_doc() or remove _id field before returning response to prevent FastAPI serialization error.
